heading: Korora vs Kosciuszko National Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Korora, New South Wales and Kosciuszko National Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kosciuszko National Park has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Korora (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Korora or Kosciuszko National Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Korora has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Kosciuszko National Park scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Korora scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Kosciuszko National Park scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Korora or Kosciuszko National Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kosciuszko National Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
